◎简　　介  

　　In one of the narrow streets of the Old town of Stockholm lies hotel City. It's filled by mysterious characters such as 'Greven', 'Blomman' and others. The police inspector Goeransson is chasing a jewel thief, 'Diamant-Lasse'.
